mapper.select: /*getAdminDtl*/ SELECT A.ADMN_NUMB , A.ADMN_IDXX , A.PASS_WORD , A.ADMN_NAME , A.AUTH_CODE , C.SORT_ORDR AS AUTH_LEVEL , A.DEPT_CODE , A.FAIL_CNTX , A.LGIN_DATE , A.REGI_DATE FROM TM_ADMINX A LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD C ON C.COMM_CODE = #{authCode} AND C.COMD_CODE = A.AUTH_CODE AND NVL(C.USEE_YSNO, #{yes}) = #{yes} WHERE A.ADMN_IDXX = #{admnIdxx}
